description: Deno WebGPU benchmark: Doe (@simulatte/webgpu via node-compat) vs deno-webgpu (built-in wgpu)

doe.notes: Doe N-API provider loaded via Deno node-compat layer

deno-webgpu.notes: Deno built-in WebGPU backed by wgpu (requires --unstable-webgpu)

comparability.notes: Both providers measured at JS API boundary via performance.now(). Apples-to-apples: same workload code, same dispatch geometry, same buffer sizes.

claimability.notes: Doe must beat deno-webgpu at both p50 and p95 with >=19 timed samples.
